title: Welt der Spiele
content:
{{Top|rwc}}
'''Welt der Spiele GmbH''' was a [[Wikipedia:Germany|German]] publisher of roleplaying games and board games based in [[Wikipedia:Frankfurt|Frankfurt]]. The company was responsible for printing German translations of several [[West End Games]] roleplaying books.

==''Star Wars'' bibliography==
*''Star Wars: Das Rollenspiel'' (''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'')
*''Star Wars: Spielleiterset'' (''[[Star Wars Gamemaster Screen]]'')
*''Star Wars: Das Handbuch'' (''[[The Star Wars Sourcebook]]'')
*''Handbuch der Rebellenallianz'' (''[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook]]'')
*''Die Erben des Imperiums Quellenbuch'' (''[[Heir to the Empire Sourcebook]]'')
*''Die Dunkle Seite der Macht Quellenbuch'' (''[[Dark Force Rising Sourcebook]]'')
*''Das letzte Kommando Quellenbuch'' (''[[The Last Command Sourcebook]]'')
*''Das Vermächtnis von Alderaan'' (''[[Graveyard of Alderaan]]'')
*''Operation Starfall'' ([[Starfall (adventure)|''Starfall'']])
*''Der Todesstern - Technisches Handbuch'' (''[[Death Star Technical Companion]]'')
*''Kopfgeldjäger'' (''[[Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters]]'')
*''Angriff auf Hoth'' (''[[Assault on Hoth]]'')
